resultList.dtldesc: An exceptional opportunity to own a spacious residence in one of Chennais most well-connected neighbourhoods, this 4 BHK apartment in Koyambedu combines expansive interiors with excellent lifestyle amenities and seamless city access. Three bathrooms are attached to the bedrooms, while one serves as a common facility. All bathrooms are designed in western style and fitted with showers. The apartment is semi-furnished, with only air conditioners installed in the bedrooms. The living room remains open and semi-furnished, allowing flexibility for personalised interiors. Residents benefit from two covered car parking spaces. The building provides round-the-clock security with CCTV surveillance, offering a safe and secure living environment. The society is well equipped with lifestyle amenities including a modern clubhouse, swimming pool and fully equipped gymnasium. Recreational facilities such as dedicated play areas and courts for cricket, basketball, pickleball and tennis add to the community living experience, making it suitable for families with children and fitness enthusiasts alike. With its expansive layout, strong connectivity and premium amenities, this apartment presents a compelling residential option in a prime city location.

resultList.dtldesc: Located in the well established residential neighbourhood of Metro Nagar, Chennai, this ready to move 1 BHK builder floor apartment offers a comfortable and practical living environment. Positioned in a peaceful yet well connected locality, the property is suitable for individuals, couples or investors seeking a compact residence with convenient access to important city infrastructure and daily lifestyle facilities.Property SpecificationsThis semi furnished apartment is situated on the ground floor of a three storey residential building and features a super built up area of 667 sq. ft. The thoughtfully designed layout includes one bedroom and two bathrooms, ensuring functionality and comfort for everyday living. The apartment is south facing and benefits from good natural light and ventilation.The residence overlooks the only park in Metro Nagar, providing pleasant green views and a refreshing atmosphere. As a ground floor property, it offers easy accessibility and convenience for residents of all age groups. The apartment falls within the five to ten years age bracket and is offered under freehold ownership, ensuring complete ownership rights for the buyer.The semi furnished condition allows the new owner to personalise the interiors according to individual lifestyle needs while still benefiting from essential fittings already in place.FacilitiesThe property includes CCTV covered parking, enhancing security and convenience for residents. The Chennai International Airport is located approximately 10 kilometres from the property, making travel convenient. The locality also benefits from proximity to major IT hubs, enhancing its residential and investment appeal.This well positioned 1 BHK apartment in Metro Nagar presents a practical opportunity for homebuyers seeking a ready to move residence in a developing and well connected part of Chennai.

resultList.dtldesc: Comfortable Builder Floor Living in Ram Nagar, VelacherySet within a calm and well-established residential pocket of Chennai, this ready-to-move 2 BHK builder floor apartment in Sahana Apartment, Ram Nagar, Velachery, offers a balanced blend of privacy, functionality, and everyday convenience.
